agentScripts.name: Entrapment Response Protocol
agentScripts.description: Guided script for handling elevator entrapment calls - highest priority emergency response
agentScripts.triggerCondition: Case Type = Entrapment OR Priority = Critical

steps.title: Emergency Verification
steps.scriptText: "I understand someone is trapped in the elevator. I'm treating this as an emergency and dispatching help immediately. Can you confirm the building address and which elevator?"

steps.title: Occupant Status Check
steps.scriptText: "Is the person in the elevator responsive and able to communicate? Are there any medical concerns we should be aware of?"

steps.title: Medical Emergency Protocol
steps.scriptText: "I'm noting the medical concern. Have you called 911? If not, please do so now. I'll stay on the line and coordinate our technician response with emergency services."

steps.title: Location Confirmation
steps.scriptText: "I'm confirming the location now. The elevator is stuck between floors [X] and [Y] at [Building Name], correct?"

steps.title: Dispatch Technician
steps.scriptText: "I'm dispatching our nearest available technician now. Let me give you the estimated arrival time."

steps.title: Customer Communication
steps.scriptText: "[Technician Name] is on the way and will arrive in approximately [ETA]. Their direct number is [Tech Phone]. In the meantime, please keep the elevator intercom line open with the occupant. Is there anything else you need right now?"

steps.title: Wrap-Up & Follow-Up
steps.scriptText: "I'll call you back in 10 minutes with an update unless you hear from the technician first. Is [phone number] the best number to reach you?"

agentScripts.name: Service Request Intake
agentScripts.description: Standard script for taking new service requests - covers all non-emergency issues
agentScripts.triggerCondition: New Case OR Case Type NOT IN (Entrapment, Unit Out of Service)

steps.title: Greeting & Account Verification
steps.scriptText: "Thank you for calling Otis Service. I see you're calling from [Account Name]. How can I help you today?"

steps.title: Issue Details
steps.scriptText: "Can you describe what's happening? Which elevator is affected?"

conditions.question: Is this affecting building operations significantly?

steps.title: Schedule Service
steps.scriptText: "I'll schedule a service visit for you. When would be a convenient time for our technician to come?"

steps.title: Billing Transfer
steps.scriptText: "I'll transfer you to our billing department. They'll be able to help you with that. One moment please."

steps.title: Knowledge Base Resolution
steps.scriptText: "I found some information that might help. Let me walk you through this."

steps.title: Summary & Close
steps.scriptText: "To summarize, I've created case number [Case Number] for [Issue Description]. [Next Steps]. Is there anything else I can help you with today?"

agentScripts.name: Contract Renewal Discussion
agentScripts.description: Script for handling contract renewal inquiries and retention conversations
agentScripts.triggerCondition: Case Type = Contract Question AND account.contractExpiry < 90 days

steps.title: Acknowledge & Review
steps.scriptText: "I see your contract is coming up for renewal on [Expiry Date]. I'd be happy to discuss your options. Let me pull up your account details."

steps.title: Service Review
steps.scriptText: "Over the past year, we've completed [X] service calls and [Y] preventive maintenance visits. Your average response time has been [Z]. How has your experience been overall?"

steps.title: Address Concerns
steps.placeholder: Document any concerns or issues the customer raises
steps.scriptText: "I want to make sure we're addressing any concerns you might have. Is there anything about our service that you'd like to see improved?"

steps.title: Present Options
steps.scriptText: "Based on your current coverage and needs, here are some options to consider:"

options.label: Renew Current Plan
options.description: Continue with same coverage and terms

steps.title: Next Steps
steps.scriptText: "I'll make sure [selected action/next step]. Our Account Manager [AM Name] will follow up with the formal renewal proposal. When would be a good time for them to call?"

macros.name: Start Emergency Timer
macros.description: Starts SLA timer for critical cases

macros.name: Create Emergency Work Order
macros.description: Creates a high-priority work order and triggers dispatch

macros.name: Create Work Order
macros.description: Creates a standard work order from case

macros.name: Mark Script Complete
macros.description: Updates case notes with script completion

macros.name: Send Knowledge Article
macros.description: Emails selected KB article to customer

macros.name: Schedule Account Manager Callback
macros.description: Creates task for Account Manager follow-up

actions.subject: Customer Callback - {{account.name}} Contract Renewal
actions.description: Customer requested callback regarding contract renewal. See case {{case.ticketnumber}} for details.

quickResponses.title: Standard Greeting
quickResponses.text: Thank you for calling Otis Service. My name is {{agent.name}}. How can I help you today?

quickResponses.title: Brief Hold Request
quickResponses.text: May I place you on a brief hold while I look into that? It should only take a moment.

quickResponses.title: Technician ETA
quickResponses.text: I've dispatched a technician who will arrive within {{eta}} minutes. Their name is {{tech.name}} and their direct number is {{tech.phone}}.

quickResponses.title: Case Created
quickResponses.text: I've created case number {{case.ticketnumber}} for this issue. You can reference this number if you need to follow up.

quickResponses.title: Transfer Notification
quickResponses.text: I'm going to transfer you to our {{department}} team who can better assist you with this. Please hold for just a moment.

quickResponses.title: Standard Closing
quickResponses.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today? Thank you for calling Otis Service. Have a great day.

quickResponses.title: Acknowledge Frustration
quickResponses.text: I completely understand your frustration, and I'm sorry you've experienced this issue. Let me make this right for you.

quickResponses.title: Escalation Notice
quickResponses.text: I want to make sure this gets the attention it deserves. I'm escalating this to our {{team}} team who will follow up with you within {{timeframe}}.

features.name: KB Article Recommendations
features.description: Suggests relevant knowledge articles based on case content

features.name: Next Best Action
features.description: Suggests next steps based on case type and status
